title: FPS + PVP BOOST
description: A lightweight Minecraft modpack focused on improving FPS, reducing lag, and enhancing PvP performance for smoother gameplay on both low-end and high-end PCs.
body:
◉ FPS + PvP BOOST

FPS + PvP BOOST is a lightweight Fabric modpack built for players who want maximum performance and competitive PvP gameplay without changing the vanilla Minecraft experience.

Whether you're playing on a low-end laptop or a powerful gaming PC, this modpack delivers smoother gameplay, higher FPS, reduced lag, and faster response times.

◉ Features

● Massive FPS Improvements

Carefully selected optimization mods significantly increase frame rates and improve overall game performance.

● Reduced Input Delay

Experience faster mouse response and smoother combat for more accurate PvP fights.

● Stable Frame Times

Enjoy consistent gameplay with fewer FPS drops during intense battles and crowded areas.

● Faster World Loading

Improved chunk generation and loading speeds reduce waiting times and increase responsiveness.

● Better PvP Experience

Optimized settings and performance enhancements help improve reaction speed and combat precision.

● Low-End PC Friendly

Designed to run efficiently on older hardware while still benefiting modern gaming systems.

● Lightweight Design

No unnecessary content, only essential performance and PvP improvements.

◉ Recommended For

✓ PvP Players

✓ Crystal PvP

✓ Bedwars

✓ SkyWars

✓ Survival Multiplayer

✓ Competitive Minecraft

✓ Low-End PCs

✓ High FPS Enthusiasts
